Thanksgiving (2023)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $31,945,385Details
International Box Office $14,099,495
Worldwide Box Office $46,044,880
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $1,114,170
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $2,105,029
Total $3,219,199
Further financial details...

Synopsis

After a Black Friday riot ends in tragedy, a mysterious Thanksgiving-inspired killer terrorizes Plymouth, Massachusetts—the birthplace of the holiday. Picking off residents one by one, what begins as random revenge killings are soon revealed to be part of a larger, sinister holiday plan. Will the town uncover the killer and survive the holidays… or become guests at his twisted holiday dinner table?

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$10,306,272 (32.3% of total gross)
Legs:3.10 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:69.4% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$15,000,000 (worldwide box office is 3.1 times production budget)
Theater counts:3,204 opening theaters/3,204 max. theaters, 4.0 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $34,918,668

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: November 17th, 2023 (Wide) by Sony Pictures
International Releases: November 16th, 2023 (Wide) (New Zealand)
November 16th, 2023 (Wide) (Australia)
November 16th, 2023 (Wide) (Germany)
November 16th, 2023 (Wide) (Italy)
November 17th, 2023 (Wide) (United Kingdom)
Video Release: December 19th, 2023 by TriStar Pictures Video
MPA Rating: R for strong bloody horror violence and gore, pervasive language and some sexual material.
(Rating bulletin 2807 (cert #54355), 11/1/2023)
Running Time: 106 minutes
Franchise: Thanksgiving
Filming location (country): Canada
Geographical setting: Massachusetts
Plot point: Serial Killer
Social setting: Thanksgiving
Subgenre: Holiday Horror
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: Spyglass Media Group, Tri-Star Pictures, Dragonfly Entertainment, EMP Productions
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

After a Black Friday riot ends in tragedy, a mysterious Thanksgiving-inspired killer terrorizes Plymouth, Massachusetts—the birthplace of the holiday. Picking off residents one by one, what begins as random revenge killings are soon revealed to be part of a larger, sinister holiday plan. Will the town uncover the killer and survive the holidays… or become guests at his twisted holiday dinner table?
